meta.title: Café Zack — Zakaria Alizouaoui
meta.description: Data, software, and platform engineering services from Algiers. Walk into Café Zack.

hero.instructions: a portfolio simulation in algiers · drive with WASD · F to step out and walk · C to call the R4 back · pull up to a landmark · v0.0.1

projects.title: Selected work
projects.intro: A few builds, framed by what changed for the team — names kept private.

health.title: Healthcare data platform
health.outcome: Pulled scattered hospital records into one warehouse so clinicians read same-day dashboards instead of week-old spreadsheets.

telecom.title: Telecom usage analytics
telecom.outcome: A streaming pipeline turning raw network events into the churn and usage metrics the growth team now checks every morning.

ops.title: Reporting automation
ops.outcome: Replaced a manual monthly report with a self-serve pipeline; the finance team closes the books days earlier.

about.name: Zakaria Alizouaoui
about.bio1: Algiers-based engineer building the unglamorous machinery that makes data useful — pipelines, warehouses, and the dashboards teams actually open every morning.
about.bio2: I work across the stack: ingestion and transformation, platform and DevOps, and the web apps that put the numbers in front of people. Now taking on a handful of freelance clients across MENA and beyond.
